task_description: The lodging price_band tag is currently too coarse (only price_band_budget/price_band_mid exist) -- a 970-room full-service hotel (ホテルグレイスリー新宿, the Godzilla Hotel) and an international upscale brand (HOTEL GROOVE SHINJUKU, A PARKROYAL Hotel) are both tagged price_band_mid, identically to budget/economy business hotel chains like 東横イン and アパホテル, even though real market prices differ enormously. Your job: research actual typical per-night prices (weekday, single/double standard room or capsule/cabin equivalent, as applicable) for these 23 real lodging entries and assign each a price tier: price_band_budget (roughly under ¥8,000/night -- capsule hotels, internet cafe overnight stays), price_band_mid (roughly ¥8,000-20,000/night -- standard business hotel chains, most love hotels), or price_band_high (roughly ¥20,000+/night -- full-service/branded hotels, international upscale chains). Entries to research: ブース ネットカフェ&カプセル, 新宿区役所前カプセルホテル, カプセルホテル新宿510, グリーンプラザ新宿, ELE Cabin 新宿歌舞伎町, アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町タワー, アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町中央, 東横イン東京新宿歌舞伎町, 快活CLUB 新宿歌舞伎町店, グランサイバーカフェ Bagus 新宿(歌舞伎町), ゲラゲラ 新宿マンガ喫茶, ホテル モアナ新宿(アダルト専用), HOTEL & SPA J-MEX 新宿歌舞伎町(アダルト専用), HOTEL Perrier(アダルト専用), スーパーホテル新宿歌舞伎町, カプセルホテル トランジット新宿, ホテルバリアンリゾート新宿本店, HOTEL PASHA, HOTEL ATLAS, アプレシオ 新宿ハイジア店, グランカスタマ歌舞伎町店, ホテルグレイスリー新宿, HOTEL GROOVE SHINJUKU (A PARKROYAL Hotel). For each: cite the source (official site rate page, a booking aggregator like Rakuten Travel/Jalan/Booking.com showing a representative price, etc.) and the actual price or price range found, then state which of the 3 tiers it maps to and why. Love hotels typically price per 'rest'/'stay' rather than per night -- use the overnight/'stay' (宿泊) rate, not the short-rest rate, for tier assignment, and note this distinction explicitly for any love hotel entry. If a reliable current price cannot be found for a specific entry, say so explicitly and suggest a tier based on the venue's stated brand/chain positioning (e.g. 'business hotel chain, comparable listed peers price X-Y') rather than leaving it unresolved -- but flag clearly which entries are backed by a real cited price versus which are chain-comparable inference. Read-only research output only, no repository files modified.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
